title: satureja montana subsp. montana
intro: Satureja montana subsp. montana, also known as summer savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant activity. Summer savory has been traditionally used to aid digestion, relieve symptoms of colds and flu, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among other health benefits. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in cooking and herbal remedies.
